name: Belagavi

economy.perCapitaIncomeNote: State-level estimate, not a measured district figure

perCapitaIncome.note: District-level PCI rank not yet sourced; current value is a state-level estimate

keySectors: Aerospace & Precision Manufacturing (Aequs SEZ — India's first aerospace SEZ)
Foundry, Auto Components & Hydraulics (one of India's largest foundry clusters)
Sugar & Bioenergy (Karnataka's leading sugar district — ethanol & co-generation)
Agriculture (sugarcane, tobacco at Nippani, vegetables, dairy)
strengths: Aequs Aerospace SEZ — India's first aerospace precision-manufacturing SEZ, supplying global OEMs (Airbus, Boeing supply chains)
Among India's largest foundry and hydraulic-cylinder clusters (Udyambag / Belagavi industrial belt)
Karnataka's leading sugarcane and sugar district, with co-generation and ethanol capacity
High agricultural productivity across the western (assured-rainfall) belt
Designated Beyond Bengaluru tech cluster with a growing IT/ESDM base
Divisional headquarters and second seat of the Karnataka legislature (Suvarna Vidhana Soudha)
Strong connectivity — NH-48 (Pune–Bengaluru), Belagavi (Sambra) airport, major rail junction
Large, comparatively skilled industrial workforce and established MSME ecosystem
challenges: Severe groundwater stress in the eastern blocks — 4 Over-Exploited and 1 Critical (Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal, Kagavada)
Sharp east–west disparity: dry, over-pumped east vs assured-rainfall west
Health-facility shortfall against population norms, especially Community Health Centres
Foundry cluster faces modernization and environmental-compliance pressure
Sugar economy is water-intensive and exposed to price/cane-arrear cycles
Large rural population dependent on water-stressed agriculture
District-level economic data (PCI, GDDP) still rests on state-level estimates
opportunities: Deepen the Aequs-anchored aerospace ecosystem with tier-2/3 precision suppliers
Modernize the foundry cluster toward cleaner processes and EV / new-energy components
Scale sugar-linked ethanol and co-generation under the national biofuel push
Convert the over-exploited eastern belt to drip, recharge and canal-lift irrigation
Grow the Beyond Bengaluru tech and GCC footprint on lower land/operating costs
Expand food processing and dairy value chains off the agricultural base
Heritage and nature tourism (Kittur, Saundatti Yellamma, Gokak Falls)

groundwater.source: Central Ground Water Board (CGWB) — dynamic groundwater resource assessment

summary.note: Belagavi's eastern blocks are severely stressed — 4 Over-Exploited and 1 Critical. Khanapur (11.7%) and Kitthuru (42.1%) in the west retain real headroom.

groundwater.roadmapImplication: Halt new groundwater extraction in Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal and Kagavada — shift to drip, artificial recharge and canal/surface-lift irrigation. New groundwater-based irrigation only has headroom in Khanapur and Kitthuru.

accessGap.norm: IPHS (plains): 1 sub-centre per 5,000; 1 PHC per 30,000; 1 CHC per 1,20,000
accessGap.note: Indicative gap against IPHS norms on 2011 population — to be verified against current population and the actual referral network. The CHC shortfall is the most acute and shapes the secondary-care build-list.

kpis.title: Community Health Centres
details: Gap to verify against current population

roadmap.planningNote: Indicative UrbanMorph development scaffold for Belagavi. Phase budgets, progress and job figures are planning estimates pending departmental and DPR data; baseline groundwater and health data are from official sources.

components.name: Eastern Belt Water Security

blockTargeting.basis: CGWB groundwater stage of extraction by block
blockTargeting.note: Stop new borewells in the 5 Over-Exploited/Critical eastern blocks; convert to drip, recharge and canal-lift. New groundwater irrigation only in Khanapur and Kitthuru.

items: Drip & micro-irrigation conversion in over-exploited blocks
Artificial recharge and tank rejuvenation, eastern belt
Canal / surface-lift augmentation to reduce groundwater dependence

components.name: Rural & Industrial Connectivity
items: Last-mile roads to agro-markets and industrial estates
Sambra airport and rail freight linkages

components.name: Health Infrastructure Upgrade
items: New Community Health Centres against the norm shortfall
Sub-centre and PHC strengthening in under-served taluks

components.name: Aerospace & Precision Cluster Expansion
items: Tier-2/3 precision-supplier park around the Aequs SEZ
Aerospace skilling and AS9100 readiness programmes

components.name: Foundry Cluster Modernization
items: Shift toward EV / new-energy component lines
Common testing, treatment and effluent facilities

components.name: Skilling & Digital Economy
items: Aerospace, foundry and IT skilling pipelines

phase3.name: Diversify
phase3.description: Food processing and dairy value chains, tourism circuits (Kittur, Saundatti, Gokak Falls), and urban infrastructure for Belagavi city as a divisional growth hub.

financing.details: PMKSY, PMFME, RIDF, AMRUT, aerospace & MSME schemes

overview.status: Aerospace SEZ operational and expanding; foundry & sugar clusters established; figures are planning estimates
overview.confidence: Planning estimate — pending Udyog Mitra / KIADB verification

sectors.name: Aerospace & Precision Manufacturing
sectors.priorityNote: Anchored by the Aequs SEZ — India's first aerospace precision-manufacturing SEZ (operational, exporting to global OEM supply chains)
products: Sheet-metal and assemblies for OEM supply chains
sectors.confidence: Anchor operational; expansion figures are planning estimates
sectors.recommendation: Deepen the tier-2/3 supplier base and aerospace skilling around the existing SEZ

sectors.name: Foundry, Auto Components & Hydraulics
sectors.priorityNote: One of India's largest foundry clusters; a major national source of hydraulic cylinders and machine components
sectors.confidence: Cluster established; modernization scope is planning estimate
sectors.recommendation: Modernize toward cleaner processes, shared facilities and EV / new-energy components

sectors.name: Sugar & Bioenergy
sectors.priorityNote: Karnataka's leading sugar district with multiple mills, distilleries and co-generation
sectors.confidence: Established sector; expansion figures are planning estimates
sectors.recommendation: Scale ethanol / co-gen under the biofuel push while cutting cane water intensity

digitalProximity: Aerospace SEZ and foundry cluster as deep-tech / Industry 4.0 anchors
Engineering and technical institutions for talent
NH-48 and airport connectivity to Pune and Bengaluru

alerts.title: Five Eastern Blocks Over-Exploited / Critical
alerts.impact: Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal, Kagavada — new borewells must stop; shift to drip, recharge and canal-lift

alerts.title: Community Health Centre Shortfall
alerts.impact: 8 CHCs against an IPHS norm of ~40 for the population — secondary-care build-list needed

alerts.title: Foundry Cluster Modernization Pressure
alerts.impact: Energy efficiency, cleaner melt and effluent compliance needed to stay competitive and meet norms

alerts.title: Sugar Sector Water Intensity
alerts.impact: Cane is water-intensive in already-stressed eastern blocks; pair expansion with drip mandates

dc.headline: Belagavi is a large, industrially diverse district (aerospace SEZ, foundry cluster, sugar) facing a sharp east–west water divide. Indicative Rs 18,500 Cr scaffold across 3 phases targeting ~120,000 jobs and Top-8 state rank.

water.headline: Five eastern blocks are Over-Exploited or Critical (Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal, Kagavada). The water programme must cut extraction there and add recharge, while only Khanapur and Kitthuru retain headroom.

agriculture.headline: A high-output agricultural district (sugarcane, tobacco, dairy) running into a groundwater wall in the east. The shift is from extraction-led to efficiency-led — drip, cane diversification and value addition.

actions.title: Drip conversion in cane-growing stressed blocks

industrial.headline: Belagavi has an established industrial base most districts lack: the Aequs aerospace SEZ, a major foundry & hydraulics cluster, and a large sugar-bioenergy sector. The agenda is deepening and modernization, not greenfield creation.

health.headline: 660 public facilities serve 47.8 lakh people, but Community Health Centres (8 vs ~40 norm) and sub-centres are well short. Secondary care is the binding gap.

actions.title: New CHCs against the norm shortfall
Sub-centre / PHC strengthening in under-served taluks

education.headline: Literacy at 73.5% (above the north-Karnataka average). The opportunity is aligning skilling to the district's own clusters — aerospace, foundry, sugar-tech and IT.

kdem.headline: Belagavi is a Beyond Bengaluru cluster with a rare advantage — deep-tech manufacturing anchors (aerospace SEZ, foundry) to build Industry 4.0 and engineering-led digital firms around.

minister.headline: Belagavi: 47.8 lakh people, a diverse industrial base (aerospace SEZ, foundry cluster, sugar) and a serious eastern-belt groundwater crisis. Indicative Rs 18,500 Cr scaffold across 3 phases, ~120,000 jobs, Top-8 state-rank ambition.

dataQualityFlags.note: Belagavi baseline (demographics, groundwater, health facilities) is from official sources. The development roadmap, role dashboards, and sector investment/job figures are an UrbanMorph planning scaffold — targets and estimates to be replaced with departmental, DPR and survey data.

flags.conflict: Values are state-level estimates, not measured district figures
flags.groundTruth: Directorate of Economics & Statistics, Karnataka — district domestic product

flags.conflict: Phase budgets, progress percentages and job figures are planning estimates, not adopted allocations or measured delivery
flags.groundTruth: Departmental DPRs, KIADB / Udyog Mitra, district budget and scheme MIS

flags.conflict: Gap computed against IPHS norms on 2011 population; actual referral network and current population not yet applied
flags.groundTruth: District Health Office facility audit + current population

dataCompleteness.note: Baseline data official; roadmap and role dashboards are a planning scaffold — see dataQualityFlags.

fields: Groundwater stage of extraction by assessment block

fields: Public health facility registry (Sub-Centres, PHCs, CHCs, hospitals) with geolocation
